title: arabis stricta subsp. biennis
intro: Arabis stricta subsp. biennis, also known as winter cress, is a plant species that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Arabis stricta subsp. biennis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, and its leaves can be consumed raw in salads or as a cooked green.
